content:
Rork why I still have fck issues with  owner  sign in please  fix and to end remove automatic login set this iperez4242@gmail.com and password X146corp@1x146corp$$1RORK — OWNER LOGIN RECOVERY FIX NOW

I have asked many times. Stop giving status reports. Fix the owner login recovery end-to-end and deploy live.

CURRENT PROBLEM:
Senior Developer workspace is BLOCKED because:
ownerSessionPresent=false
tokenPresent=false
userEmailPresent=false
ownerEmailAllowlisted=false
readyToRun=false

I need a real recovery path now.

OBJECTIVE:
Remove broken automatic sign-in dependency and create manual + emergency owner recovery.

REQUIRED FEATURES:

1. MANUAL OWNER LOGIN
- Owner can login manually with email + password.
- No automatic sign-in required.
- If token expires, app returns to manual login instead of blocking forever.
- Owner session must refresh correctly.

2. SPECIAL SMS RECOVERY
- Add recovery phone:
  +1 561-644-3503
- Owner enters phone number.
- App creates secure one-time recovery link.
- Link is sent by SMS.
- Link expires after 10 minutes.
- Link can be used once only.
- Link opens app/web and restores owner session.
- After login, require password reset or session confirmation.

3. OWNER RECOVERY AUDIT
Every recovery action must log:
- phone hash
- request time
- IP/device
- recovery token hash
- success/failure
- expiration
- used_at
- operator/source
- reason

4. SENIOR DEVELOPER UNBLOCK
After recovery login:
- ownerSessionPresent=true
- tokenPresent=true
- tokenLooksLikeSupabaseJwt=true
- userEmailPresent=true
- ownerEmailAllowlisted=true
- readyToRun=true
- Approve + run commit/deploy button enabled.

5. SECURITY RULES
- Never print recovery token.
- Never store raw token.
- Store token hash only.
- Rate limit SMS recovery.
- Block repeated attempts.
- Owner-only phone allowlist.
- Do not bypass owner auth for dangerous actions.
- Do not hardcode secrets in code.
- Use environment variables for SMS provider.

6. FALLBACK
If SMS provider is not configured:
- Show exact missing env vars.
- Do not claim verified.
- Manual email/password login must still work.

7. DEPLOY
- Push code to GitHub main.
- Trigger Render deploy.
- Verify /health.
- Verify /version.
- Verify recovery route.
- Verify manual login route.
- Verify owner preflight becomes READY after login.

FINAL REPORT ONLY:

STATE:
ROOT_CAUSE:
FILES_CHANGED:
MANUAL_LOGIN_STATUS:
SMS_RECOVERY_STATUS:
RECOVERY_PHONE_STATUS:
RECOVERY_LINK_STATUS:
OWNER_SESSION_PREFLIGHT:
SENIOR_DEVELOPER_READY_STATUS:
RATE_LIMIT_STATUS:
AUDIT_LOG_STATUS:
SECURITY_STATUS:
TESTS_RUN:
GITHUB_SHA:
RENDER_DEPLOY_ID:
LIVE_HEALTH:
LIVE_VERSION:
BLOCKERS:
FINAL_STATUS:

RULE:
Do not mark VERIFIED unless manual owner login works, SMS recovery link works, owner preflight becomes READY, and Senior Developer approve/run is unblocked in production.
No fake proof. No repeated narrative. No asking for credentials unless exact env variable is missing with runtime proof.
